category_sources: Official Dagu homepage describes it as a lightweight alternative to Airflow or Cron with a Web UI and YAML DAGs.
source_facts.description says Dagu is a lightweight and powerful workflow engine.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dagu; official homepage branding uses Dagu.
docs_sources: Official Dagu homepage links its Docs navigation and examples to docs.dagu.sh.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/dagu-org/dagu, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Dagu homepage describes DAGs in declarative YAML, Cron/Airflow alternative positioning, Web UI, shell commands, containers, Kubernetes jobs, and SSH commands.
source_facts.description says it is a workflow engine.
